## Meeting Purpose

[Ali advises Jason on a LinkedIn ad strategy for GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy:** Use hyper-targeted campaigns (e.g., ad + content for one industry) to generate high-quality leads, as Understory's internal campaigns prove the model works.](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [**Tactics:** Use LinkedIn Lead Forms for high conversion and UTMs on direct Calendly links for precise tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [**Experiment:** Start with a tight experiment (one service, one goal) and a $5k–$10k/mo budget to validate the channel's value before scaling.](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [**Retargeting:** Use dynamic HubSpot lists to retarget warm audiences (e.g., open opportunities) with relevant content like case studies.](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)

## Topics

### The Understory Playbook: Hyper-Targeted Campaigns

  - [Understory's internal campaigns (\~$3k/mo spend) generate qualified meetings by targeting specific personas within a single industry.](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [**Example:** A cybersecurity campaign (ad + organic content) generated a call from a publicly traded company.](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [**Cost per Qualified Meeting:** \~$300–$350.](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)

### Core Tactics: Lead Capture & Tracking

  - [**Direct-to-Calendly:**](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
      - [**Process:** Ad → Calendly link with UTMs.](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
      - [**Why:** UTMs enable precise tracking of booking source.](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [**LinkedIn Lead Forms:**](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
      - [**Process:** Ad → Pre-populated form → Confirmation message with Calendly link.](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
      - [**Why:** High conversion rates; can validate for work emails only.](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
      - [**Integration:** Connects directly to HubSpot or via Zapier.](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)

### Audience Targeting: Precision & Automation

  - [**Company List Uploads:**](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
      - [**Process:** Upload a list of target companies → overlay job titles.](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
      - [**Why:** Highly predictable and reliable targeting.](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=313.0)
  - [**Dynamic HubSpot Lists:**](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
      - [**Process:** Connect HubSpot to LinkedIn Ads.](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
      - [**Why:** Automatically syncs audiences, enabling retargeting of warm leads (e.g., website visitors, event attendees) with specific content.](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)

### Experiment Plan for GrowthX

  - [**Goal:** Validate if LinkedIn ads can drive value for GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
  - [**Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
      - [**Focus:** One service line, one goal (e.g., demo bookings).](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
      - [**Budget:** $5k–$10k/mo.](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
      - [**Tracking:** Install the LinkedIn Insight Tag (pixel) and set up conversion tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [**Potential Bottleneck:** GrowthX's single salesperson is already at capacity with 20+ open deals.](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Validate the channel first; the bottleneck is a good problem to solve.](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)

### Advanced Tactic: Message Ads

  - [**Function:** Sponsored messages appearing in the LinkedIn inbox.](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [**Flow:** Message with CTA → LinkedIn Lead Form.](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
  - [**Why:** Effective for retargeting users who have already engaged with a standard ad.](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)

### Understory Agency Services

  - [**Model:** Staffing with a dedicated channel expert and senior oversight.](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
  - [**Pricing (6-month term):**](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
      - [**$8k/mo:** One channel (e.g., Paid Social)](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
      - [**$12k/mo:** Two channels (e.g., Paid Social + Paid Search)](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
      - [**Spend Tiers:** Up to $50k/mo, $50k–$150k/mo, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
      - [Launch a LinkedIn ad experiment to validate the channel.](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
      - [Install the LinkedIn Insight Tag and configure conversion tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
      - [Define a tight experiment plan: one service, one goal, and a $5k–$10k/mo budget.](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)
      - [Consider using dynamic HubSpot lists for retargeting open opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/bbocyry7qyzCnzRPCuffF5mTnsWyF8bV?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
